---
title: "vas_240_min"
subtitle: "`vas_240_min`"
description: "vas_240_min"
---

<!--
NEVER EDIT MANUALLY. This documentation was auto-generated by `seedcase-flower`.
If you want to edit the content, please make changes to the `datapackage.json` file.
-->

- Path: `resources/vas_240_min/data.parquet`
- Primary key: (`event`)

| Name                      | Title                        | Type   | Description                                                                                                                                                        |
|---------------------------|------------------------------|--------|--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| `event`                   | The unique name of the event | string | The unique name identifying the event when the form was filled in.                                                                                                 |
| `center`                  | Research center              | string | The research center where the data item was recorded.                                                                                                              |
| `vas_hunger_240min`       | vas_hunger_240min            | number | Visual analogue scale. Hunger at time 240 min Question: Hvor sulten er du?. Slider scale labels: Jeg er slet ikke sulten | Jeg har aldrig været mere sulten        |
| `vas_satisfaction_240min` | vas_satisfaction_240min      | number | Visual analogue scale. Satisfaction at time 240 min Question: Hvor mæt er du?. Slider scale labels: Jeg har et stort hul i maven | Jeg kan ikke få en bid mere ned |
| `vas_full_240min`         | vas_full_240min              | number | Visual analogue scale. Fullness at time 240 min Question: Hvor fyldt op føler du dig?. Slider scale labels: Slet ikke fyldt op | Fyldt totalt op                   |
| `vas_how_much_240min`     | vas_how_much_240min          | number | Visual analogue scale. How much to eat at time 240 min Question: Hvor meget tror du, at du kan spise?. Slider scale labels: Slet ingenting | Virkelig meget        |
| `vas_comfort_240min`      | vas_comfort_240min           | number | Visual analogue scale. Comfort at time  240 min Question: Hvordan føler du dig tilpas?. Slider scale labels: Virkelig dårligt | Virkelig godt                      |
| `vas_nausea_240min`       | vas_nausea_240min            | number | Visual analogue scale. Nausea at time  240min Question: Har du kvalme?. Slider scale labels: Ja, meget | Nej, slet ikke                                            |
| `vas_thirst_240min`       | vas_thirst_240min            | number | Visual analogue scale. Thirst at time  240 min Question: Hvor tørstig føler du dig?. Slider scale labels: Overhovedet ikke | Virkelig meget                        |
| `vas_sweet_240min`        | vas_sweet_240min             | number | Visual analogue scale. Sweet at time  240 min Question: Har du lyst til at spise noget sødt?. Slider scale labels: Nej, slet ikke | Ja, meget                      |
| `vas_salt_240min`         | vas_salt_240min              | number | Visual analogue scale. Salt at time  240 min Question: Har du lyst til at spise noget salt?. Slider scale labels: Nej, slet ikke | Ja, meget                       |
| `vas_fat_240min`          | vas_fat_240min               | number | Visual analogue scale. Fat at time  240 min Question: Har du lyst til at spise noget fedtrigt?. Slider scale labels: Nej, slet ikke | Ja, meget                    |

: Fields in the `vas_240_min` resource.
